title: Golden's Additions
body:
![rMmqb.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ImOuFkod/images/614a9efcabe3f2338a3e0bc3551a3d77f1735bfe.png)
--- 
## <center>This is a mod that adds somethings useful to minecraft.
---
### Requires:
- **[Geckolib3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib "geckolib")**.
- **[Cloth-Config-Api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config "cloth config api")**.
- **[Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-fabric "patchouli")**.
-  I recommend to play this mod with [REI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-items "rei") and [Modmenu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu "modmenu").
### Includes:
 -  **New armors and tools.**
 -  **A new dimension.**
 - **Two interesting foods.**
 - **A new enchanment and a new potion.**
 - **Some useful things like bamboo charcoal.**
---
>At the beginning, you should crafting the guide book by the crafting table that you can have a good understanding of the contents of this mod.
>
>![rP4hV.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ImOuFkod/images/674b511f2c70dc97c0bb48211795ab85ed529d5c.png)
>- Ancient Notes
---
>If you have entered the end,you may find ores like those in the picture.Don't leave them,they will give you powerful ability,but they are rarely found.
>![rPHhp.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ImOuFkod/images/a12c163e85d4a81e5790b0f058f5713fae2e81f4.png)
>- Void Ores
---
>Then you can with the power of them and other materials to crafting powerful equipments by a new ploymerization machine.
>
>![rPIay.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ImOuFkod/images/966283ea2ebd0e94be36e42f1546917a0465eeed.png)
>- Recipe displaying in REI.
>
> But I should tell you in advance, each of them is very difficult to obtain,You have to challenge many kinds of powerful mobs.
---
>If you are strong enough and lucky enough,you will get all of these equipments:
>![rP3B8.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ImOuFkod/images/140cc46fad70d1739d19e9b39e9338c0539faeae.png)
>![rPRJZ.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ImOuFkod/images/d68556a575fd872b671cdb27390be97cf28efb33.png)
>- Void armors and tools,they are all 3D.
---
### Some others things:
- Bamboo charcoals: 
 You can burn bamboos to bamboo charcoals,and then tie them into a bundle,a bamboo charcoal can burn for 20s, while a bundle of bamboo charcoal can burn for 80s like coal.
- ChannelingEX:
 The upgraded version of channeling enchanment,allows you to ignore the weather and summon lightning.
- SellingSoul potion:
 A potion but has two opposite effects,when using this potion ,you can only get one side between them,one is blessings while another is debuffs.
 - New dimension:
 A flat world like some resources dimension mods,but this dimension has no ore,just some animals,but you can build your farms villas or factories here.
 - More content, please experience in the game.
 ---
 ### Future plans:
 >In the next period of time, I will have little time to continue to develop this mod,if I can take time off, I will continue to add some new ideas.At the beginning, I really want to join some interesting creatures which is why I used geckolib,I hope that I can use it more often in the future.
 >- If you find a bug, you can put it up on [github](https://github.com/LYGoldenc/goldens_additions/issues). I would be very grateful.
